description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and a prominent front facade featuring three garage doors and a central entryway. The exterior is primarily light gray with large rectangular windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house includes multiple rooms, visible through the open back and side walls, with distinct color schemes such as pink, white, and black. A decorated Christmas tree is visible in the main living area, suggesting a spacious and open-plan interior. The main entryway is slightly recessed with a small set of steps and a decorative door. The overall design is boxy and geometric, with clean lines and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A large, modern two-story house with a flat roof, three garage doors, and expansive windows. The exterior is light gray with a central entryway and a spacious, open-plan interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing three garage doors, a central entryway with steps, and large windows on both floors.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the house, multiple rooms with different colors, and additional windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open back, interior room layouts, and large windows on the upper floor.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting more rooms, window placements, and the overall boxy structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Central recessed entry with steps, a single decorative door, and no porch or columns
